ayahs.textArabic: تَبَٰرَكَ ٱلَّذِي بِيَدِهِ ٱلۡمُلۡكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٌ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Tabaraka allathee biyadihi almulku wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeerun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Blessed is He in whose hand is dominion, and He is over all things competent -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Blessed is the One in Whose Hands rests all authority. And He is Most Capable of everything.

ayahs.textArabic: ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلۡمَوۡتَ وَٱلۡحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبۡلُوَكُمۡ أَيُّكُمۡ أَحۡسَنُ عَمَلٗاۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡغَفُورُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Allathee khalaqa almawta waalhayata liyabluwakum ayyukum ahsanu AAamalan wahuwa alAAazeezu alghafooru
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [He] who created death and life to test you [as to] which of you is best in deed - and He is the Exalted in Might, the Forgiving -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹He is the One˺ Who created death and life in order to test which of you is best in deeds. And He is the Almighty, All-Forgiving.

ayahs.textArabic: ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ سَبۡعَ سَمَٰوَٰتٖ طِبَاقٗاۖ مَّا تَرَىٰ فِي خَلۡقِ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ مِن تَفَٰوُتٖۖ فَٱرۡجِعِ ٱلۡبَصَرَ هَلۡ تَرَىٰ مِن فُطُورٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Allathee khalaqa sabAAa samawatin tibaqan ma tara fee khalqi alrrahmani min tafawutin fairjiAAi albasara hal tara min futoorin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [And] who created seven heavens in layers. You do not see in the creation of the Most Merciful any inconsistency. So return [your] vision [to the sky]; do you see any breaks?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹He is the One˺ Who created seven heavens, one above the other. You will never see any imperfection in the creation of the Most Compassionate. So look again: do you see any flaws?

ayahs.textArabic: ثُمَّ ٱرۡجِعِ ٱلۡبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيۡنِ يَنقَلِبۡ إِلَيۡكَ ٱلۡبَصَرُ خَاسِئٗا وَهُوَ حَسِيرٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Thumma irjiAAi albasara karratayni yanqalib ilayka albasaru khasian wahuwa haseerun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then return [your] vision twice again. [Your] vision will return to you humbled while it is fatigued.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Then look again and again—your sight will return frustrated and weary.

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَقَدۡ زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِمَصَٰبِيحَ وَجَعَلۡنَٰهَا رُجُومٗا لِّلشَّيَٰطِينِۖ وَأَعۡتَدۡنَا لَهُمۡ عَذَابَ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaqad zayyanna alssamaa alddunya bimasabeeha wajaAAalnaha rujooman lilshshayateeni waaAAtadna lahum AAathaba alssaAAeeri
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We have certainly beautified the nearest heaven with stars and have made [from] them what is thrown at the devils and have prepared for them the punishment of the Blaze.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And indeed, We adorned the lowest heaven with ˹stars like˺ lamps, and made them ˹as missiles˺ for stoning ˹eavesdropping˺ devils, for whom We have also prepared the torment of the Blaze.

ayahs.textArabic: وَلِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِرَبِّهِمۡ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَۖ وَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walillatheena kafaroo birabbihim AAathabu jahannama wabisa almaseeru
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And for those who disbelieved in their Lord is the punishment of Hell, and wretched is the destination.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Those who disbelieve in their Lord will suffer the punishment of Hell. What an evil destination!

ayahs.textArabic: إِذَآ أُلۡقُواْ فِيهَا سَمِعُواْ لَهَا شَهِيقٗا وَهِيَ تَفُورُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Itha olqoo feeha samiAAoo laha shaheeqan wahiya tafooru
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: When they are thrown into it, they hear from it a [dreadful] inhaling while it boils up.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: When they are tossed into it, they will hear its roaring as it boils over,

ayahs.textArabic: تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ ٱلۡغَيۡظِۖ كُلَّمَآ أُلۡقِيَ فِيهَا فَوۡجٞ سَأَلَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمۡ يَأۡتِكُمۡ نَذِيرٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Takadu tamayyazu mina alghaythi kullama olqiya feeha fawjun saalahum khazanatuha alam yatikum natheerun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: It almost bursts with rage. Every time a company is thrown into it, its keepers ask them, "Did there not come to you a warner?"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: almost bursting in fury. Every time a group is cast into it, its keepers will ask them, “Did a warner not come to you?”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ قَدۡ جَآءَنَا نَذِيرٞ فَكَذَّبۡنَا وَقُلۡنَا مَا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَيۡءٍ إِنۡ أَنتُمۡ إِلَّا فِي ضَلَٰلٖ كَبِيرٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qaloo bala qad jaana natheerun fakaththabna waqulna ma nazzala Allahu min shayin in antum illa fee dalalin kabeerin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: They will say," Yes, a warner had come to us, but we denied and said, 'Allah has not sent down anything. You are not but in great error.'"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: They will reply, “Yes, a warner did come to us, but we denied and said, ‘Allah has revealed nothing. You are extremely astray.’”

ayahs.textArabic: وَقَالُواْ لَوۡ كُنَّا نَسۡمَعُ أَوۡ نَعۡقِلُ مَا كُنَّا فِيٓ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waqaloo law kunna nasmaAAu aw naAAqilu ma kunna fee ashabi alssaAAeeri
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And they will say, "If only we had been listening or reasoning, we would not be among the companions of the Blaze."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And they will lament, “If only we had listened and reasoned, we would not be among the residents of the Blaze!”

ayahs.textArabic: فَٱعۡتَرَفُواْ بِذَنۢبِهِمۡ فَسُحۡقٗا لِّأَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: FaiAAtarafoo bithanbihim fasuhqan liashabi alssaAAeeri
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And they will admit their sin, so [it is] alienation for the companions of the Blaze.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And so they will confess their sins. So away with the residents of the Blaze!

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ لَهُم مَّغۡفِرَةٞ وَأَجۡرٞ كَبِيرٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum bialghaybi lahum maghfiratun waajrun kabeerun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, those who fear their Lord unseen will have forgiveness and great reward.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, those in awe of their Lord without seeing Him will have forgiveness and a mighty reward.

ayahs.textArabic: وَأَسِرُّواْ قَوۡلَكُمۡ أَوِ ٱجۡهَرُواْ بِهِۦٓۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمُۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waasirroo qawlakum awi ijharoo bihi innahu AAaleemun bithati alssudoori
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And conceal your speech or publicize it; indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Whether you speak secretly or openly—He surely knows best what is ˹hidden˺ in the heart.

ayahs.textArabic: أَلَا يَعۡلَمُ مَنۡ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلۡخَبِيرُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ala yaAAlamu man khalaqa wahuwa allateefu alkhabeeru
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Does He who created not know, while He is the Subtle, the Acquainted?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: How could He not know His Own creation? For He ˹alone˺ is the Most Subtle, All-Aware.

ayahs.textArabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ ذَلُولٗا فَٱمۡشُواْ فِي مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُواْ مِن رِّزۡقِهِۦۖ وَإِلَيۡهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Huwa allathee jaAAala lakumu alarda thaloolan faimshoo fee manakibiha wakuloo min rizqihi wailayhi alnnushooru
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: It is He who made the earth tame for you - so walk among its slopes and eat of His provision - and to Him is the resurrection.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He is the One Who smoothed out the earth for you, so move about in its regions and eat from His provisions. And to Him is the resurrection ˹of all˺.

ayahs.textArabic: ءَأَمِنتُم مَّن فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يَخۡسِفَ بِكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ فَإِذَا هِيَ تَمُورُ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Aamintum man fee alssamai an yakhsifa bikumu alarda faitha hiya tamooru
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not cause the earth to swallow you and suddenly it would sway?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Do you feel secure that the One Who is in heaven will not cause the earth to swallow you up as it quakes violently?

ayahs.textArabic: أَمۡ أَمِنتُم مَّن فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ حَاصِبٗاۖ فَسَتَعۡلَمُونَ كَيۡفَ نَذِيرِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Am amintum man fee alssamai an yursila AAalaykum hasiban fasataAAlamoona kayfa natheeri
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Or do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not send against you a storm of stones? Then you would know how [severe] was My warning.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Or do you feel secure that the One Who is in heaven will not unleash upon you a storm of stones. Only then would you know how ˹serious˺ My warning was!

ayahs.textArabic: وَلَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Walaqad kaththaba allatheena min qablihim fakayfa kana nakeeri
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And already had those before them denied, and how [terrible] was My reproach.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And certainly those before them denied ˹as well˺, then how severe was My response!

ayahs.textArabic: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ إِلَى ٱلطَّيۡرِ فَوۡقَهُمۡ صَٰٓفَّٰتٖ وَيَقۡبِضۡنَۚ مَا يُمۡسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءِۭ بَصِيرٌ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Awalam yaraw ila alttayri fawqahum saffatin wayaqbidna ma yumsikuhunna illa alrrahmanu innahu bikulli shayin baseerun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Do they not see the birds above them with wings outspread and [sometimes] folded in? None holds them [aloft] except the Most Merciful. Indeed He is, of all things, Seeing.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Have they not seen the birds above them, spreading and folding their wings? None holds them up except the Most Compassionate. Indeed, He is All-Seeing of everything.

ayahs.textArabic: أَمَّنۡ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي هُوَ جُندٞ لَّكُمۡ يَنصُرُكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِۚ إِنِ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ إِلَّا فِي غُرُورٍ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Amman hatha allathee huwa jundun lakum yansurukum min dooni alrrahmani ini alkafiroona illa fee ghuroorin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Or who is it that could be an army for you to aid you other than the Most Merciful? The disbelievers are not but in delusion.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Also, which ˹powerless˺ force will come to your help instead of the Most Compassionate? Indeed, the disbelievers are only ˹lost˺ in delusion.

ayahs.textArabic: أَمَّنۡ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي يَرۡزُقُكُمۡ إِنۡ أَمۡسَكَ رِزۡقَهُۥۚ بَل لَّجُّواْ فِي عُتُوّٖ وَنُفُورٍ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Amman hatha allathee yarzuqukum in amsaka rizqahu bal lajjoo fee AAutuwwin wanufoorin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Or who is it that could provide for you if He withheld His provision? But they have persisted in insolence and aversion.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Or who is it that will provide for you if He withholds His provision? In fact, they persist in arrogance and aversion ˹to the truth˺.

ayahs.textArabic: أَفَمَن يَمۡشِي مُكِبًّا عَلَىٰ وَجۡهِهِۦٓ أَهۡدَىٰٓ أَمَّن يَمۡشِي سَوِيًّا عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Afaman yamshee mukibban AAala wajhihi ahda amman yamshee sawiyyan AAala siratin mustaqeemin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then is one who walks fallen on his face better guided or one who walks erect on a straight path?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Who is ˹rightly˺ guided: the one who crawls facedown or the one who walks upright on the Straight Path?

ayahs.textArabic: قُلۡ هُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنشَأَكُمۡ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرَ وَٱلۡأَفۡـِٔدَةَۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَشۡكُرُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qul huwa allathee anshaakum wajaAAala lakumu alssamAAa waalabsara waalafidata qaleelan ma tashkuroona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Say, "It is He who has produced you and made for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “He is the One Who brought you into being and gave you hearing, sight, and intellect. ˹Yet˺ you hardly give any thanks.”

ayahs.textArabic: قُلۡ هُوَ ٱلَّذِي ذَرَأَكُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِ تُحۡشَرُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qul huwa allathee tharaakum fee alardi wailayhi tuhsharoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Say, "It is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹Also˺ say, “He is the One Who has dispersed you ˹all˺ over the earth, and to Him you will ˹all˺ be gathered.”

ayahs.textArabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلۡوَعۡدُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹Still˺ they ask ˹the believers˺, “When will this threat come to pass, if what you say is true?”

ayahs.textArabic: قُلۡ إِنَّمَا ٱلۡعِلۡمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qul innama alAAilmu AAinda Allahi wainnama ana natheerun mubeenun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Say, "The knowledge is only with Allah, and I am only a clear warner."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “That knowledge is with Allah alone, and I am only sent with a clear warning.”

ayahs.textArabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَوۡهُ زُلۡفَةٗ سِيٓـَٔتۡ وُجُوهُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَقِيلَ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَدَّعُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Falamma raawhu zulfatan seeat wujoohu allatheena kafaroo waqeela hatha allathee kuntum bihi taddaAAoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But when they see it approaching, the faces of those who disbelieve will be distressed, and it will be said, "This is that for which you used to call."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Then when they see the torment drawing near, the faces of the disbelievers will become gloomy, and it will be said ˹to them˺, “This is what you claimed would never come.”

ayahs.textArabic: قُلۡ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِنۡ أَهۡلَكَنِيَ ٱللَّهُ وَمَن مَّعِيَ أَوۡ رَحِمَنَا فَمَن يُجِيرُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ مِنۡ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qul araaytum in ahlakaniya Allahu waman maAAiya aw rahimana faman yujeeru alkafireena min AAathabin aleemin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Say, [O Muhammad], "Have you considered: whether Allah should cause my death and those with me or have mercy upon us, who can protect the disbelievers from a painful punishment?"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “Consider this: whether Allah causes me and those with me to die or shows us mercy, who will save the disbelievers from a painful punishment?”

ayahs.textArabic: قُلۡ هُوَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَعَلَيۡهِ تَوَكَّلۡنَاۖ فَسَتَعۡلَمُونَ مَنۡ هُوَ فِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٖ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qul huwa alrrahmanu amanna bihi waAAalayhi tawakkalna fasataAAlamoona man huwa fee dalalin mubeenin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Say, "He is the Most Merciful; we have believed in Him, and upon Him we have relied. And you will [come to] know who it is that is in clear error."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Say, “He is the Most Compassionate—in Him ˹alone˺ we believe, and in Him ˹alone˺ we trust. You will soon know who is clearly astray.”

ayahs.textArabic: قُلۡ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِنۡ أَصۡبَحَ مَآؤُكُمۡ غَوۡرٗا فَمَن يَأۡتِيكُم بِمَآءٖ مَّعِينِۭ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qul araaytum in asbaha maokum ghawran faman yateekum bimain maAAeenin
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Say, "Have you considered: if your water was to become sunken [into the earth], then who could bring you flowing water?"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Say, “Consider this: if your water were to sink ˹into the earth˺, then who ˹else˺ could bring you flowing water?”
